description_long: This object is a round, plump peach with a slightly flattened top and a distinct central dimple on the bottom, characteristic of the fruit. Its skin displays a blend of reddish-pink and yellow hues, with some areas showing a gradient from deep red to pale yellow. The surface appears slightly fuzzy and uneven, with subtle dimples and natural indentations. There are visible patches of discoloration and minor blemishes, suggesting natural ripening and handling. The peach lacks any visible stem or leaf attachment. Its overall appearance suggests a fresh, ripe fruit that could be found on the ground or in an urban park.
description: A round, reddish-pink and yellow peach with a fuzzy, dimpled surface and a central bottom indentation. The skin shows natural blemishes and color variation.
description_view_0: This view highlights the deep reddish coloration and the rough, dimpled texture on one side of the peach.
description_view_1: This angle shows more yellowish patches blending with the red, and a smoother, less dimpled surface.
description_view_2: The bottom view reveals the central dimple and the lightest, most yellow area of the peach.
description_view_3: This side displays a mix of pale yellow and pink, with the dimple partially visible and a generally smoother appearance.
